payload.long_description: Narrow vertical dark-brown wooden picture frame with a gold inner trim and glass front, showing part of a framed artwork with a tall spire; the crop is edge-cut/partial (top and bottom likely outside view) with slight reflection on the glass; estimated distance from camera ~0.8 m.
